clips.title: Street Cart
clips.prompt: Handheld documentary realism, natural observational, candid, natural light, authentic, slight grain, verite. Present day. Steam, sizzling pans, hanging utensils. Natural daylight, documentary grade, handheld. Handheld push in. Authentic documentary aesthetic, 24fps.
